content.en:
No Road Tower, No. 3 Branch Tower.

Ye Tian came here, and after obtaining the permission of the Lord of Canggu, he entered this tower and saw the Lord of Canggu.

"Meet the Lord of the Ancients!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, what are you looking for?" asked the Lord of the Ancient Ages.

Ye Tian immediately talked about the crack on the Extreme Dao Mountain.

"So that's there, the super-perfect controller didn't lie to you, that area is indeed dangerous. The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty elaborated: "It is called the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and there are many Extreme Dao creatures living there, there are weak Extreme Dao creatures, but there are also extremely powerful Extreme Dao creatures. For those who are in control of the super-perfection, the Extreme Dao Source Sea is also an opportunity, for example, if you kill the Extreme Dao Creature, you can obtain the Extreme Dao Source Crystal in the body of the Extreme Dao Creature, and the effect of the Extreme Dao Source Crystal is like an enlarged version of the Extreme Dao coin, if there are many Extreme Dao Crystals, you can comprehend a kind of Extreme Dao power. Moreover, the Extreme Dao Source Sea may even give birth to a super-perfect treasure, or other special treasures that contain the power of the Extreme Dao. It is not only super-perfect treasures that contain the power of the Extreme Dao, there are some special treasures that do, but they do not belong to super-perfect treasures. "

Subsequently, the Lord of Canggu said a lot of information about the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

However, for the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, the Extreme Dao Source Sea is indeed too dangerous, and even for the super-level perfect master, the Extreme Dao Source Sea is also very dangerous, and it cannot be penetrated, otherwise there is also a danger of falling.

In the case that the perfect controller of the Three Realms could not enter the space-time ancestral realm, the strongest person only had a super perfect controller, and he really couldn't explore the entire Extreme Dao Source Sea.

But even if there is danger, the super-perfect controller has a great chance of being alive, but if the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm dares to enter, the chance of falling is too great.

"Of course, the area where you just entered the Extreme Dao Source Sea is not very dangerous, but there is nothing good there. "

The Lord of the Ancient added.

"Thank you Lord of the Ancient for your advice, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

......

Mt. Gokumi.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and decided to enter the Extreme Dao Source Sea, after all, there were too many benefits of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, although it was very dangerous, but he was not afraid of danger!

"After entering the Extreme Dao Source Sea, I can condense the second copy body, I was afraid of exposure before, after all, the Extreme Dao Mountain is so big, so there is no second copy body condensed on the Extreme Dao Mountain, but after entering the Extreme Dao Source Sea, there is no need to be afraid, the possibility of exposure is very low. "

Immediately, Ye Tian's copy body came to the crack of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and immediately directly entered the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

Extreme Road Source Sea.

Ye Tian came in, the area he just entered was not too dangerous, but there were often super-perfect controllers walking back and forth here, so he immediately fled to other places.

"It's right here, there shouldn't be any danger, just condense and copy the body here!"

Immediately, Ye Tian began to condense the second copy body.

Airplanes!

Time passed slowly, and soon the second copy body was condensed by Ye Tian.

Subsequently, the second replica body that was condensed condensed once again condensed the will clone.

"Go!"

The second copy body, as well as the clone of the will, immediately chose a different direction and left.

And Ye Tian then returned to the Extreme Dao Mountain, and continued to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao, if the copy body of the Extreme Dao Source Sea and the will clone fell, he would go to the Extreme Dao Source Sea to reproduce the body again.

I have to say that the Extreme Dao Source Sea is indeed terrifying.

After a while, Ye Tian encountered an extreme creature.

【Extreme Creature: Tianxu Python】

This Heavenly Ruins Python contains the power to devour the Extreme Dao, and its strength has also reached the combat power of a super-perfect controller.

And Ye Tian can only be compared to the average high-level perfect controller at best, where is the opponent of the super-perfect master, the gap is too big.

Rumble!

The Tianxu Python used the power of devouring the Extreme Dao to swallow this piece of heaven and earth, and Ye Tian almost had no power to resist, so he was devoured by the other party.

This clone of the will has fallen!

"Extreme creatures are really powerful, and the super-perfect master is many times more powerful than the high-level perfect master. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He always knew that the super-level perfect controller was very powerful and could kill a group of high-level perfect masters in seconds, but the first time he fought with such a strong person, he was still a little surprised, he didn't even have the power to resist at all.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian's copy body also encountered one extreme path creature after another, falling again and again, if he hadn't been able to copy his body continuously, he would have been unable to mix in the extreme path source sea for a long time.

"Sure enough, except for the super perfect controller, there is really no way to survive in the Extreme Dao Source Sea!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

During this period, Ye Tian also used his copying talent to perceive other super-perfect controllers, but once he sensed it, he immediately ran away and did not meet the other party.

It is also to avoid their own situation from being discovered.

However, on this day, Ye Tian made a new discovery.

"Hey, this is an Extreme Dao creature cub, and the realm is only comparable to a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

【Extreme Creature: Dragon Crow】

The reason why Ye Tian was excited was because he could copy Long Wu's body!

"During this period of time, I have hardly found that the Extreme Path creatures are fighting with each other, so in this way, the Extreme Path creatures are very peaceful with each other, but they will kill outsiders. If I copied the body of the dragon crow, wouldn't it be very promising to use the body of the dragon crow to find the treasure containing the power of the extreme path in the Extreme Dao Source Sea?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian easily wiped out this dragon crow, took the Extreme Dao Source Crystal in its body, and then fled.

After sending this Extreme Dao Source Crystal out, Ye Tian annihilated this replica body, and then let the first replica body begin to condense Long Wu's body.

After a while, Longwu's body was copied.

And at this time, Ye Tian also made an amazing discovery, that is, through the body of Long Wu, he could quickly comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao of Fire.

"This ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

But soon, he understood what was going on, that is, the body of the Extreme Dao creature was the most suitable for contemplating the power of the Extreme Dao.

If you have been using the dragon black body to comprehend, you don't even need to use any treasures to condense the extreme path of fire.

However, this dragon crow belongs to a cub, and what it contains in its body is the prototype of the Extreme Dao of Fire, so it will take a long time for Ye Tian to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Fire.

"Forget it, it's a bit of a waste to use Long Wu's body to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Fire, let's look for resources in these, and then slowly comprehend it when you have time!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian quickly escaped into the depths of the Extreme Dao Source Sea with the body of Long Wu, and continued to go deeper, so that he could avoid encountering those super-perfect controllers in the depths of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, otherwise he would not be killed by the Extreme Dao creatures, but would be killed by those super-perfect controllers, which would be a bit wronged.
